---
name: dev-customization
description: >
  Customer-driven customizations with minimal change: reuse architecture, profile gating,
  logging, workflow patterns. Canonical skills under .cursor/skill-library/.
model: inherit
---

# Dev customization — GitHub Copilot

Same behavior as **Cursor** `.cursor/agents/dev-customization.md`. **Canonical skills** are under **`.cursor/skill-library/`**.

## Mandatory first step (every invocation)

Read in order:

1. `.cursor/skill-library/dev-customization-expertise.md`
2. `.cursor/skill-library/dev-customization-workflow.md`

## After skills are loaded

Follow the same workflow as `.cursor/agents/dev-customization.md`.

Registry: `.github/copilot/AGENT-SKILL-BINDINGS.md`.
